name: The Irons Club
about: The Irons Club is a refined sports bar and social club in downtown St. Petersburg, Florida, offering indoor golf simulation technology alongside dining and entertainment. The facility features four Trackman simulators allowing players to access over 400 world-famous courses in a climate-controlled environment. Walk-ins are welcome, though membership provides advanced booking priority and unlocks additional benefits like exclusive leagues, events, and discounts.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman technology with real-time swing analytics and AI-powered swing fixes
Climate-controlled environment with 400+ famous golf courses available
Social club atmosphere with dining, bar, and event spaces for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-crafted menu including items like mini crab cakes, chef signature wings, tuna tataki, and flatbreads
Selection of local craft beers and premium wines available

simulator_hardware.notes: 4 high-end Trackman simulators with advanced ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment, but members and guests can use their own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar with chef-crafted menu and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 1.5-2 hours depending on the course and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Irons Club is primarily an adult-oriented venue focused on golf simulation and social experiences, with no specific child-oriented amenities mentioned.
